scope.purpose: Convert source-backed common human route patterns into candidate-generator inputs for route experiments.
scope.source_boundary: Public route pages and repo route-card evidence are behavior hints only; current-year official BTC segment data remains the official segment source.

templates.normal_start: Dry Creek / Sweet Connie roadside parking
templates.normal_direction: Shingle up / Dry Creek down; Sheep Camp and Sweet Connie variants must preserve ascent rules

public_sources.label: Shingle Creek and Dry Creek Loop
Shingle Creek and Dry Creek Loop alternate Strava route

connector_hints: Use named Dry Creek / Shingle / Sweet Connie access and return legs instead of hiding them as same-corridor overhead.
Test Shingle-up/Dry-down, Shingle plus Sheep Camp split, and Sweet Connie separate climb variants.
templates.route_experiment_goal: Regenerate the Dry Creek/Shingle/Sheep/Sweet Connie cluster from a normal loop template before preserving separate long return legs.

templates.normal_direction: Mountain Cove warm-up, Shane's / Three Bears upper loop, Central Ridge return
connector_hints: Use this as a decomposition seed for the large Military/Freestone cluster rather than only optimizing the catchall route card.
Compare Shane's/Three Bears loop, Freestone Ridge leftovers, and Central Ridge/Military core as separate legal loop candidates.
templates.route_experiment_goal: Split the high-repeat Freestone/Military component into human-recognizable loops before repricing.

templates.normal_direction: Lower Hulls climb when legal, Crestline traverse, Kestrel return
connector_hints: Preserve Lower Hulls odd/even foot legality before any route-card promotion.
Treat Motorcycle/8th Street/Camel's Back add-ons as separate experiments if they reduce frontside deadhead.
templates.route_experiment_goal: Extract a compact Hulls/Kestrel/Crestline unit before forcing lower-frontside add-ons into one route card.

templates.normal_direction: Deer Point to Around the Mountain counter-clockwise, with Pioneer-side return or same-day transfer explicitly priced
connector_hints: Replace generic OSM return proof with named runner-used return paths when legal, or preserve the Simplot/Pioneer same-day transfer as an explicit day-level cost.
Recheck Deer Point / Bogus closure windows and Around the Mountain direction before scheduling.
templates.route_experiment_goal: Generate Bogus candidates from the normal Simplot/Pioneer movement pattern instead of treating each lodge-side card in isolation.

templates.normal_start: Avimor Spring Valley Creek parking or Dry Creek Parking Area/Trailhead
templates.normal_direction: Public route-pattern source still needed; generate candidates as a cluster seed only

public_sources.label: Add a public route report or user-reviewed local route pattern before promotion

connector_hints: Use this as a generator seed for cluster repricing, not as a source-backed normal loop yet.
Compare Avimor Spring Valley parking, Dry Creek trailhead, and certifiable connector starts before any route-card replacement.
templates.route_experiment_goal: Force the generator to examine Harlow/Avimor as a connected human cluster while making the missing public-route source explicit.
